prompt: I need to create a new document in our Engineering collection in Outline. It should be titled 'Incident Response Runbook' and contain sections for Severity Levels, Escalation Path, and Communication Templates. Make it a template so the team can use it for new incidents.

assertions.text: Uses list_collections to discover the Engineering collection ID
Generated document contains markdown headings for Severity Levels, Escalation Path, and Communication Templates
